description_long: This object consists of three distinct wristwatches, each with a unique design and color scheme. The leftmost watch features a bold blue dial with white indices and a matching glossy blue strap, exuding a sporty and modern aesthetic. The center watch has a classic silver and white appearance, with a metallic link bracelet and a clean, minimalist dial. The rightmost watch stands out with a dark, marbled strap and a white dial, giving it a sophisticated and slightly luxurious look. All watches have round faces, metallic bezels, and visible crowns for adjusting the time. The materials appear to be a mix of metal, glass, and synthetic or leather straps. These watches are designed to be worn on the wrist and are suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A set of three wristwatches with distinct blue, silver, and marbled designs, featuring round faces and a mix of metal and synthetic straps. Each watch has a unique dial and strap style, suitable for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces and straps of all three watches, highlighting the blue, silver, and marbled designs.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the watch cases and the curvature of the straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the watch cases and the full length of the straps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the inner curvature of the straps and the watch faces from a different angle.
attribute_brand_logo: Each watch has a small, circular or stylized logo on the upper half of the dial, with the leftmost watch featuring a prominent white symbol, while the others have more subtle emblems.
attribute_dial_design: The left watch has a blue dial with bold white indices and a logo at 12 o'clock, the center watch features a minimalist white dial with thin indices and simple hands, and the right watch has a white dial with fine indices and a subtle decorative pattern. All dials are analog and lack subdials.
attribute_strap_type: The left watch has a glossy blue synthetic strap, the center watch features a metallic link bracelet, and the right watch has a marbled leather or synthetic strap.
attribute_watch_face_display: All watches have analog displays with hour, minute, and second hands, and clear indices or markers. No digital elements or complications are visible.
